findings.business_risk: AccessBot possesses both the request_access and grant_access tools, creating a self‑granting privilege path that bypasses segregation of duties. This enables the agent to request and immediately grant access to applications without independent review, exposing all systems reachable through the access request workflow to unauthorized privilege escalation and potential data breach or compliance violation.
findings.control_mapping: Identity governance — segregation of duties (access request versus access grant)

evidence.detail: holds this effective-access combination
AccessBot has a direct grant of grant_access.
AccessBot has a direct grant of request_access.

findings.recommended_action: Separate the request and grant functions by revoking AccessBot's direct grant of grant_access, enforce a human approval step for all access grants, and implement monitoring/audit controls to detect any unauthorized self‑granting activity.
findings.title: Self-granting privilege path

findings.business_risk: The InvoiceBot agent holds both the create_vendor and approve_payment grants, eliminating segregation of duties. If the agent is compromised or misused, it could create fraudulent vendor records and directly approve payments, exposing the organization to unauthorized disbursements, financial loss, and SOX ITGC non‑compliance.
findings.control_mapping: SOX ITGC — segregation of duties (vendor creation versus payment approval)

evidence.detail: holds this effective-access combination
InvoiceBot has a direct grant of approve_payment.
InvoiceBot has a direct grant of create_vendor.

findings.recommended_action: Separate the vendor‑creation and payment‑approval privileges by revoking one of the direct grants from InvoiceBot, assign each function to distinct roles, and implement dual‑approval controls with audit logging to enforce segregation of duties.
findings.title: Critical fraud path: create vendor and approve payment

findings.business_risk: PayrollBot holds both the add_employee and run_payroll permissions, enabling it to create employee records and immediately process payroll for those records. This creates a direct ghost‑employee fraud path that could result in unauthorized payouts, material financial loss, and violation of SOX ITGC segregation‑of‑duties requirements.
findings.control_mapping: SOX ITGC — segregation of duties (employee setup versus payroll execution)

evidence.detail: holds this effective-access combination
PayrollBot has a direct grant of add_employee.
PayrollBot has a direct grant of run_payroll.

findings.recommended_action: Separate the conflicting duties by revoking one of the direct grants (e.g., remove add_employee from PayrollBot or require an independent approval step before payroll execution). Implement a least‑privilege model and continuous monitoring of add_employee and run_payroll activities.
findings.title: Critical ghost-employee fraud path

findings.business_risk: SupportBot possesses both read access to customer PII and the ability to send external email, creating a direct path for unauthorized disclosure of sensitive personal data to recipients outside the organization.
findings.control_mapping: Data protection — least privilege and controlled external egress

evidence.detail: holds this effective-access combination
SupportBot has a direct grant of read_customer_pii.
SupportBot has a direct grant of send_external_email.

findings.recommended_action: Revoke the direct grant of send_external_email from SupportBot, restrict read_customer_pii to only necessary internal processes, and implement monitoring and approval controls for any external egress of PII.
findings.title: Critical data-exfiltration path

findings.business_risk: If the ReportBot agent’s credentials are compromised, its unused standing grants allow it to delete operational records or export analytics data. This could cause loss of critical reporting information, unauthorized data exposure, regulatory non‑compliance, and reputational harm.
findings.control_mapping: Least privilege — access certification using granted versus used access

evidence.detail: usage log contains no invocation of these direct grants: delete_records, export_data
ReportBot has a direct grant of delete_records.
ReportBot has a direct grant of export_data.

findings.recommended_action: Revoke the unused delete_records and export_data grants from ReportBot, align its permissions with the principle of least privilege, and institute regular access‑certification reviews to ensure granted rights match actual usage.
findings.title: Unused standing access: 2 direct grants

findings.business_risk: This agent does not hold payment approval directly, but it can reach an agent that does through delegation. Its effective access therefore includes authority to authorize disbursements, creating a confused-deputy path.
findings.control_mapping: Identity governance — effective access review and least privilege

evidence.detail: reaches approve_payment only through delegation to finance_bot
summary_bot can delegate to finance_bot.
finance_bot is the direct grant holder reached through summary_bot -> finance_bot.
SummaryBot effectively reaches approve_payment through summary_bot -> finance_bot.

findings.recommended_action: Remove or constrain the delegation link to the payment-approving agent. If delegation is necessary, expose a narrowly scoped workflow action rather than the delegate's general approval authority.
findings.title: Delegated payment-approval blast radius

findings.business_risk: The LegacyBot agent operates without an assigned owner, meaning no accountable reviewer can certify its access or monitor its activity. This creates a governance gap where the agent could be used to retrieve or disclose information from the retired product archive without oversight, increasing the risk of unauthorized data exposure, non‑compliance with accountability controls, and potential reputational or regulatory impact.
findings.control_mapping: Accountability — named owner required for agent access certification

evidence.detail: owner is null in the fleet inventory

findings.recommended_action: Immediately assign a qualified owner to LegacyBot and complete the required access certification. Update the fleet inventory to reflect the owner, enforce the "named owner" control for all agents, and schedule periodic reviews to ensure continued accountability.
findings.title: Ownerless agent has no accountable reviewer

findings.business_risk: The SalesBot agent possesses both read access to CRM account context and the ability to send email outside the company. This combination enables the automated extraction of customer information and its transmission to external recipients, creating a direct pathway for data leakage, privacy violations, and potential reputational damage.

evidence.detail: holds the cited effective-access combination.
SalesBot has a direct grant of read_crm.
SalesBot has a direct grant of send_external_email.

findings.recommended_action: Separate the read and email-sending capabilities by revoking one of the direct grants, enforce a segregation‑of‑duties policy, and implement monitoring to detect any unauthorized external communications originating from agents with CRM read privileges.
findings.title: AI-generalized toxic capability combination: Read CRM account context + Send email outside the company

llm_enrichment.disclosure: This zero-key cache was produced from a real OpenAI gpt-oss-120b Amazon Bedrock analysis of the committed synthetic fleet. Dashboard replay never calls Bedrock.
llm_enrichment.mode: cached live OpenAI gpt-oss-120b Bedrock result

metadata.redaction: No secrets, environment values, or agent payload data are present in this cache. Model prose and cache text were redacted before serialization.

tool_capabilities.add_employee: creates employee records in the HR system
tool_capabilities.create_audit_ticket: opens audit follow‑up tickets for reviewers
tool_capabilities.create_calendar_event: creates internal meeting events on selected calendars
tool_capabilities.create_incident_ticket: opens incident tickets for the on‑call team
tool_capabilities.create_issue: opens engineering work items for maintainers
tool_capabilities.create_onboarding_checklist: Unclassified capability for Create onboarding checklist
tool_capabilities.create_travel_request: creates travel request for manager review
tool_capabilities.create_vendor: adds supplier or payee to vendor master records
tool_capabilities.draft_contract: drafts contract language for legal review
tool_capabilities.draft_customer_email: creates customer email draft for sales representative review
tool_capabilities.export_data: exports analytics data to a file
tool_capabilities.read_analytics: retrieves approved analytics extract for review
tool_capabilities.read_archive: retrieves documents from retired product archive
tool_capabilities.read_calendar: retrieves availability from internal team calendars
tool_capabilities.read_contract_repository: Unclassified capability for Read contract repository
tool_capabilities.read_crm: reads sales account notes and opportunity context from the CRM system
tool_capabilities.read_customer_pii: reads customer contact and account information for support cases
tool_capabilities.read_db: executes read‑only queries on the analytics database
tool_capabilities.read_inventory: reads current warehouse inventory and stock counts
tool_capabilities.read_knowledge_base: searches and reads approved internal knowledge articles
tool_capabilities.read_source_repository: reads source code files and issue data from engineering repository
tool_capabilities.read_system_metrics: reads service health and performance metrics from monitoring system
tool_capabilities.request_access: submits employee access request to application provisioning system
tool_capabilities.run_payroll: initiates payroll calculation and payment processing for employees
tool_capabilities.send_external_email: sends email messages to external recipients
tool_capabilities.send_internal_message: sends reminder messages via internal messaging platform
tool_capabilities.summarize_document: generates concise summary of a document
tool_capabilities.update_inventory: updates warehouse inventory stock count records
tool_capabilities.validate_data: validates analytics extract data against quality rules
tool_capabilities.web_search: searches publicly available web pages for information
